name: Red Lobster Cheese Rolls Small Recipe
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Mix bisquick, water and cheese. Drop by large spoonfuls onto greased baking sheet. Bake for 8-10 minutes. After baking, brush melted butter or margarine mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes and Italian seasoning (amounts will vary depending on batch size) onto the rolls while hot. Serve immediately.
